title: corydalis micrantha subsp. australis
intro: Corydalis micrantha subsp. australis, also known as the Southern Fumewort, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Corydalis micrantha subsp. australis include its ability to relieve pain, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
